[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00011110 4
4 10011000 3
5 00000001 1
6 00100101 3
7 11110000 4

01 10 00011000 2
12 21 00000000 a match 0 1 2
23 32 00000001 1 match 5
34 43 00100000 1
45 54 10010000 2
56 65 00011000 2
67 76 00001010 2
70 07 00001110 3

02 20 00000000 a match 0 1 2
13 31 00000000 a match 0 1 2
24 42 00000000 a match 0 1 2
35 53 00000000 a match 0 1 2
46 64 00010000 1
57 75 00001000 1
60 06 00011010 3
71 17 00001000 1

03 30 00000100 1
14 41 10010000 2
25 52 00000000 a match 0 1 2
36 63 00000000 a match 0 1 2
47 74 00100000 1
50 05 00011000 2
61 16 00011000 2
72 27 00000001 1 match 5

04 40 00010000 1
15 51 10011000 3 match 4
26 62 00000000 a match 0 1 2
37 73 00100101 3 match 6
[completion]
